title: BrightVolt Electrical Services
description: Multi-page site with service showcase, project gallery, customer reviews, and prominent call CTAs for urgent electrical needs.
challenge: Outdated site losing visibility and failing to convert emergency nighttime calls. Previous design was hard to read on mobile devices.
solution: Modern, mobile-first rebuild focusing on one primary CTA: getting the phone to ring. Separated standard service pages from emergency dispatch to match customer intent.

title: FlowWorks Plumbing (Dallas, TX)
description: Service pages for each plumbing specialty, verified review section, service-area map, and same-day dispatch messaging to reduce response friction.
challenge: Customer was losing bids because their website didn't list specific specialties (e.g., tankless water heaters) clearly, making users bounce back to search.
solution: Created dedicated service pages for each high-value offering, establishing local relevance. Integrated real reviews to build immediate trust.

title: Arctic Breeze HVAC
description: HVAC-specific messaging (seasonal promotions, emergency availability), service-area coverage, and heating/cooling split to match customer search intent.
challenge: Client needed a way to dynamically shift focus between AC repair in the summer and Heating in the winter without redesigning the site.
solution: Built a modular homepage that allows the owner to swap the primary hero messaging based on the season, directly addressing immediate weather-related pain points.

title: Terra & Bloom Landscapes
description: Portfolio-focused design for upscale landscaping. Image-heavy, refined typography, and emphasis on craftsmanship and long-term relationships with clients.
challenge: Client was tired of getting low-budget mowing inquiries and wanted to position themselves exclusively for high-end hardscaping and landscape design projects.
solution: Shifted visual language to a more editorial, high-end look using ample negative space, elegant typography, and large photography to filter for premium clients.
